The native will be one amongst the ruling authorities of the country
if the Sun and Venus aspect the Navamsa sign of Atrnakaraka. The
native trades in cattle when the Sun aspected by Jupiter occupies the
10'1' sign counted from the Navamsa sign. An expert in making watd'tes
and docks is made by Kethu posited in the 4th sign from the Navamsa.
Rahu i"' that position makes the native clever in making or operating
machines and instruments. The Moon posited in the Navamsa sign of
Atmakaraka or in the Sth sign there from brings forth an eXJ)ert roosician
the Sun a keen philosopher or a musician and Kethu a clever
mattlemattician or an astronomer.
